data.body: Tenth review BLOCK remediation: accepted f2fe4d132765805a1 by explicitly retaining review_snapshot in _run_plan_review and threading related_material through new keyword-only sidecar.emit/build_payload parameters on full LLM reviews; reuse/refresh keep their existing no-sidecar behavior. Accepted fdef08f14fda613c3/ffdee300f36da4f95 with exact resolution/io/reducer classification. Accepted f4313fd43d46df796/f75fab5c648f8ac20 by separating raw sidecar parsing from typed PlanMaterialPin health derivation and defining material_fingerprint→pinned_fingerprint mapping. Accepted rollback/profile/order advisories by preserving plan_review_result_v2, adding legacy-reader coverage, directly testing CLOSE semantics, and documenting why health precedes cheaper early returns. Rerunning before downstream review.
